text: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp. You will work with Python and React. The salary is $150,000. It is a Remote position.
Join our early-stage Seed startup, InnovateIt, as a Data Scientist. Reach out to John Doe, our VP of Engineering. Strong knowledge of PyTorch and AWS is required. Hybrid role in SF paying 120k.
No salary listed, just pure passion. Need a backend dev with Go and PostgreSQL for our Series A company. On-site in NYC.
